lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good morning.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Sorry, but this is NOT a good morning!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, what's the matter?

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: I'm going to lose my job!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you done to deserve that?

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Nothing! But the Piscatoris Fishing Colony is going to go out of business, and I'll have to go back to the east.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: If you want to help, you can get Kathy to take you up to the Colony. Herman's looking for someone to run an important errand for him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear it in mind.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things going for the Colony now the trolls have all gone away?

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Well, it's been fairly quiet around here, but there's always repair work to keep us busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Catching plenty of fish?

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Oh yes, lots of them. Their population's been swelling ever since you wiped out the trolls in the area. They've hardly got any natural predators now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I suppose that's good...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what you're doing.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Franklin's got me fixing this wall. You did a pretty good patch-job, but it could do with some work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not surprised - iron sheets won't last any time at all with all that salt water around.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Yes, that's right. I'll probably get Arnold to order some fancy protective paint from the dwarves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know all your doors get stuck open?

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Yes, the salt does terrible things to the hinges. I've been meaning to deal with them, but I never seem to get around to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, I'm fine.

lines.speaker: Devin Mendelberg
lines.text: Enjoy your fishing.
